message:
fix(ci): complete Windows and macOS compatibility fixes

- Fix clippy collapsible if statements in binary_hash.rs
- Update mock.rs to use ssh_utils::CommandResult (Unix-agnostic)
- Make remote_compilation and remote_verification modules Unix-only

These changes complete the cross-platform compatibility work
started in the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
